data.body:
EPIC B (peak-fir-hilt / 72d5) — migrate the LLM gates onto the workflow engine. STATUS: 5 of 9 stories DONE + on main; 4 remain.

DONE (signed-closed, merged to main):
- B1 knotty-hat-chase: ProductionBatchRunner. Part 1 = extracted Pass-1 finder loop from orchestrator.py into plan_review/pass1.py (run_pass1 + helpers + material_fingerprint; behaviour-preserving, PR #30). Part 2 = plan_review/production_batch_runner.py reconstructs PlanContext via assemble_context(target_ticket), resolves criteria prompt-ids->registry descriptors, splits by exec_tier, owns an injectable rebar.llm.Runner (D3), calls run_pass1, journals coverage as opaque batch_plan (PRs #32 + #34 AC2 tests). usd_budget override journaled-not-applied (documented follow-up: thread cap_override through run_pass1->shed_to_budget).
- B3 core-farce-seed: completion-verifier workflow gates/completion-verification.yaml + gate_ops.py (precheck->branch[verify|passthrough]); workflow-as-gate pattern (ADR 0003).
- B-DM dark-tempo-rug: prompt_library.py — enumerate_library/enumerate_criteria + create_prompt/update_prompt (writes .rebar/prompts, drift-gate-safe) + validation. The editor's data-model backend.
- B2 unfed-posse-urn: gates/plan-review.yaml + workflow_ops.py (precheck->branch[assemble_criteria->batch finders(ProductionBatchRunner)->verify->decide->coach | passthrough]). Extracted partition_findings/finalize_verdict/pass3_over_findings from run_review + render_coach_notes from pass4_coach (shared path, no dup). 31 criteria gated by when: include_<ID>. Does NOT sign (B5).
- B4 key-gun-morph: tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_parity.py + _parity_corpus.py + TracingFakeRunner in trace.py. Two-seam planned-trace capture (batch rebar.llm.Runner finders + engine AgentStepRunner verify/coach); 11-scenario corpus; diversity-enforced (proven non-vacuous); offline.

REMAINING:
- B5 pout-gloss-hoop (UNBLOCKED, critical, HIGH BLAST RADIUS — touches the LIVE claim/close gates): cut the claim gate (plan-review) + close gate (completion-verification) over to the workflow path behind a config flag (default workflow), bespoke reachable as fallback. Signed verdicts/attestations must stay byte-compatible (CI verifies). DECISION RECORDED (user): make the workflow VERIFY step DYNAMIC — agentic when any finding is code-grounded (match bespoke pass2_verify(agentic=grounded)); implement via a branch on a code_grounded boolean -> agentic-verifier prompt vs single-turn (ADR 0001 fixed-execution-mode => two prompts, not a dynamic mode); author an agentic verifier prompt variant; then upgrade B4 parity verify-call-mode assertion to cross-assert equality. Also recorded on B5: run_pass1 re-raises LLMUnavailableError (systemic) whereas bespoke run_review degrades to unsigned INDETERMINATE — the workflow path must reproduce INDETERMINATE-on-outage before cutover. And: P1/P5/P8 DET-block short-circuits the workflow without LLM vs bespoke merging an LLM pass on P1 (B4 documents; reconcile).
- B6 arid-stump-twin (blocked by B5): remove throwaway samples (examples/code_review.yaml + templates.py scaffold; keep examples/review_skeleton.yaml); preserve forwarding shims (rebar workflow new). End state: 2 real workflows + 1 sample.
- B-UX lanky-turret-worry (UNBLOCKED, ready, independent, additive frontend): editor_assets/src/rebarProvider.jsx — replace text-field criterion/prompt/when editing with library-backed DROPDOWNS (from B-DM enumerate) + overlay-trigger dropdown (from the workflow's overlay_triggers outputs) + inline create-new-trigger + FULL in-editor authoring of new criteria AND prompts (via B-DM create_prompt + index regen). Needs an editor-server endpoint to call B-DM. Real-browser Playwright E2E. NOTE recorded: editor server must write under the same repo_root the registry reads.
- B-RETIRE chip-rib-gong (blocked by B5+B6, FINAL): after parity exhaustively validated + soak, remove the B4 parity harness + retire bespoke orchestrator.run_review (+ ThreadPoolExecutor fan-out + B5 fallback flag); workflow becomes the sole gate; keep shared machinery (pass1/det_floor/registry/passes/sizing/attest/ProductionBatchRunner).

EPIC FOLLOW-UP (user, on epic): once plan-review is migrated+cutover, CONFIRM whether the worm-folly-barge stale-attestation stopgap in CLAUDE.md is still needed; if not, REMOVE it (likely in B5 or B6). Recorded on B5 + the epic.

PROCESS NOTES for resume: (1) per-story gated cycle = review-plan -> CLAIM IMMEDIATELY (stale-attestation stopgap) -> implement (delegate to a subagent with a precise spec) -> code-review subagent -> full suite (use -m 'not integration' locally: the live-Jira reconcile test fails without JIRA_PROJECT) -> CLOSE via completion verifier (REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM=1) BEFORE opening the PR (so AC gaps are caught before auto-merge — bit us on #32) -> PR -> gh pr merge --auto --squash. (2) main is VERY active (reconciler PRs merge constantly) — rebase onto origin/main right before push; auto-merge needs the branch up-to-date (strict policy). (3) use the repo-checkout .venv/bin/rebar for gates. (4) commit trailers: Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) + Claude-Session; PR body: Generated with Claude Code. (5) design doc: docs/design/batch-runner-seam.md.
